cases.name: false-completed-prevention
cases.assertion: after-go with archive but no evidence must not produce completed/completed

cases.name: idempotency
cases.assertion: same archive/head after-go sync appends only one task-log event

cases.name: unsafe-path-rejection
cases.assertion: handoff path escaping the repo is rejected

cases.name: workflow-suggest-adoption-flywheel
cases.assertion: repeated task ids produce a workflow suggestion with harness delegation, and a workflow_adopted log event suppresses the candidate until new repetition accumulates
